User.title: User
User.description: The user record holding personalized avatar stats, quests, phantoms, bazaar purchases, stages, and journal logs.

userId.description: The authenticated Google user's unique identification UID.

stats.description: UserStats object keeping levels, xp, coins, and stamina values.

quests.description: List of active daily quests and their completion states.

phantoms.description: List of bestiary phantoms representing real-world bad habits.

stages.description: List of milestone evolution stages unlocked by the player.

bazaarItems.description: List of reward loot shop items and lock statuses.

updatedAt.description: The server-synced time of the last modification.

/users/{userId}.description: Document containing the entire gamified progress for each unique human player.
